name: Swing 365 Golf - Gretna
about: Swing 365 Golf - Gretna is a state-of-the-art golf simulator venue that offers a membership-based community experience with a warm and private club atmosphere. The facility provides 365/24/7 access to individual simulator suites, which can be conveniently booked online. Members can enjoy a round of golf, practice for an upcoming tournament, or socialize with friends in a premium setting. The venue is designed for golfers who want to play on their own schedule and access detailed performance data to improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Full Swing™ Pro Series simulator with 688 infrared sensors for ultra-precise ball tracking
95+ world-class virtual courses, including Pebble Beach, accessible 24/7
Membership model provides unlimited or flexible simulator time for dedicated practice
Ability to bring your own food and beverages for a personalized experience
Detailed performance data helps translate simulator practice to on-course improvement

food_and_drink.notes: Patrons can bring their own food
Patrons can bring their own beverages (BYOB)

simulator_hardware.notes: Widescreen simulator with 688 infrared sensors across two tracks

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, it is standard practice for golf simulator venues to allow players to use their own clubs for the most authentic experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, Swing 365 Gretna allows members to bring their own food and beverages (BYOB) to enjoy during their simulator session.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round on a simulator can take approximately 2-3 hours, depending on the pace of play and simulator session length.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically market itself as kid-friendly and operates as a membership-based private club, which suggests it is primarily focused on adult golfers.
